websocket_callback_timing_t(3) Library Functions Manual websocket_callback_timing_t(3)

NAME

websocket_callback_timing_t - WebSocket callback timing data for protocol lifecycle.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/callback_timing.h>

Data Fields


websocket_callback_stats_t protocol_init
websocket_callback_stats_t protocol_destroy
websocket_callback_stats_t server_writeable
websocket_callback_stats_t receive

Detailed Description

WebSocket callback timing data for protocol lifecycle.

Aggregates statistics for PROTOCOL_INIT and PROTOCOL_DESTROY callbacks.
